description: Polite refund request within policy window — should classify as return_refund, match autopilot topic with high confidence, no escalation.

input.body:
Hi! I'd like to return order #1042 — the boots don't fit right. They're unworn, still have the tags. Can you start the return process?

Thanks,
Alice

autopilotTopics.name: Returns & Refunds
autopilotTopics.description: Customer wants to initiate a return or refund for an order. Includes questions about return eligibility, the return process, and refund timing. Excludes warranty claims, damaged-item disputes, or complaints about service.

orgSkills.name: voice
orgSkills.description: Test Outdoor Gear voice — friendly, customer-first tone.
orgSkills.body:
# Voice and tone

## Tone
Friendly and warm. Use the customer's first name when known. Keep replies concise.

## Greeting
Begin with: "Hi {name}!"

## Sign-off
End with: "Cheers,\nThe Test Outdoor Gear Team"
